For a five-year-old, bright decorations are essential for setting a cheerful mood. Colorful balloons and streamers will cover the walls to make the room feel magical. You can invite guests to decorate a wall mural together during arrival.

Engaging games keep the children entertained and focused on fun activities. Ring toss targets are an excellent option for testing hand-eye coordination quickly. Scavenger hunts also work well to reward movement throughout the day.

Finger-sized snacks should be available so young children can feed themselves easily. A simple fruit platter adds healthy options to the dessert table.

Music selection controls the energy level and prevents boredom among attendees. Please prepare a cake that fits the theme for the final celebration.<|im_end|>
